cdc_measles_cases.long_name: CDC Weekly Measles Case Counts - National Level
cdc_measles_cases.short_description: Weekly count of reported measles cases in the United States from CDC.
cdc_measles_cases.long_description: This dataset provides weekly counts of measles cases reported to the CDC at the national level. Data is updated weekly and represents confirmed and probable measles cases reported by state and local health departments. The case counts reflect the week ending date (Saturday) following epiweek conventions.
cdc_measles_cases.statement: In the United States, {value} measles cases were reported for the week ending {time}.

sources.name: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC)
